item.title: City clears homeless encampment near Gilman Street as residents scramble
item.description: Berkeley crews swept the encampment at Second and Gilman on Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Supriya Yelimeli

item.title: New bakery opens on Solano Avenue
item.dc:creator: Food Desk

item.title: Berkeley council weighs street vendor permit overhaul on Telegraph
item.description: Street vendors say the city's permitting rules are unworkable.
item.dc:creator: Nico Savidge
